Advertise on St. John House Rentals

Advertising Your Property

Get in Touch with Our Team

Do you own or manage a property on St. John? Advertise your St John villa, timeshare, or Bed and Breakfast with St John's oldest vacation rentals site.

We offer a flat-rate annual subscription for each listing. We do the work for you. All changes are free. NO commissions on bookings!

​

VISITORS TO ST JOHN - THIS IS NOT FOR BOOKING INQUIRIES.

If you are interested in information on or booking a villa, please, communicate directly with St John Owners/Managers from the page of each vacation rental home of interest. The email link or phone number on each vacation rental page will get you directly to the person who can help!
